title: Indextras
description: Adds new simple vanilla friendly enchantments
body:
This mod adds 11 simple enchantments and curses to Minecraft!
These enchantments are balanced with the [Indexed](https://modrinth.com/mod/indexed-enchanting) mod in mind, but Indexed is not required to run this mod.

**Enchantments Added**

| Enchantment | Description | Slot | Treasure | Curse |
| ----------- | ----------  | ---- | -------- | ----- |
| Blessing    | Increases length of positive status effects | Chestplate | No | No
| Debuff Resistance | Decreases length of negative status effects | Chestplate | No | No
| Sturdy | Increases i-frame time after taking damage | Chestplate | No | No
| Tank | Take no damage if incoming damage is below a small threshold | Chestplate | No | No
| Dexterity | Decrease i-frame time after taking damage for enemies | Sword | No | No
| Endure | Grants Resistance II when broken | Armor | Yes | No
| Hiding | Makes the item invisible | Any | Yes | No
| Curse of Mystery | Hides the item's enchantments | Any | Yes | Yes
| Curse of Disintegration | Mined blocks drop nothing | Mining tools | Yes | Yes
| Keeping | Chance to Keep item on death | Any | Yes | No
| Slow Burn | Increases rocket duration at the expense of speed | Elytra | No | No
